## Introduction

CloudApi is a set of cloud rendering and front-end display application programming interfaces (API) developed by JavaScript. On the basis of the 51world rendering platform, the client 3D scene is embedded in the web page in the form of video stream. Users can overlay their own data components and interact with the scene in both directions. WdpApi is compatible with current mainstream JavaScript front-end frameworks, providing fast and convenient development interfaces for front-end developers.

The wdpapi platform based on the full factor scene makes the development of 3D scenes so easy!

## Documentation

To check out and docs, visit [wdpapi.51aes.com](http://wdpapi.51aes.com)

#### Install
```bash
$ npm i cloudapi
```

#### Import
```javascript
import CloudApi from 'cloudapi';
```
